chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 182 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: من حقر مؤمنا فقيرا لم يزل الله عز وجل له حاقرا ماقتا حتى يرجع عن محقرته إياه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: If one belittles a destitute believer, Allah [M.G] will not cease scorning and loathing him until he makes up for his looking down on the believer.
